summary: Backend testing of Stripe webhook integration and Commission Service - 19/19 tests passed (100%). All webhook event types are correctly parsed. Commission rules API, Cron jobs API, and Reports API all working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/webhooks/stripe - accepts events and returns {received: true}
checkout.session.completed event parsing - correctly handles payment success
refund.created event parsing - correctly handles refund events
GET /api/commissions/rules - returns 3 default rules (referrer, rep, sales_user)
Commission rules have hold_days set (14/30 days)
Commission rules have correct structure (rule_id, name, role_type, commission_type, commission_value)
GET /api/cron/status - returns active status with 4 jobs
Cron jobs have name, schedule, description fields
GET /api/reports/referrals - works without errors (previously was broken)
critical_code_review_comments: Code structure is clean - Stripe webhook handler properly handles raw body before JSON middleware
Commission rules correctly positioned before /:commissionId route (fixed from iteration 10)
CommissionService properly calculates hold_until date (14 days default from rule.hold_days)
Cron jobs properly initialized on server start via initializeCronJobs()
Audit logging implemented for all webhook events
Font enforcement in index.css using Montserrat for headings, Inter for body - properly implemented
seed_data_creation: 3 default commission rules exist: sales_user (10%), rep (4%), referrer (5%)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stripe webhook integration fully tested. All webhook event types (checkout.session.completed, refund.created, payment_intent.succeeded, charge.refunded, charge.dispute.created) are properly parsed. Commission rules API fixed (was 404 in iteration 10, now returns 3 rules). Reports/referrals API also fixed. Cron jobs initialized at server start. Note: Stripe is in MOCK mode for testing - webhooks process locally but no real Stripe calls.

mocked_integrations.stripe: MOCKED - Stripe payments in mock mode (STRIPE_API_KEY=sk_test_emergent)
mocked_integrations.gohighlevel: MOCKED - GoHighLevel notifications in mock mode

cron_jobs.process_pending_validations: Daily at 2:00 AM - moves past hold period to pending_approval
cron_jobs.auto_approve_commissions: Daily at 3:00 AM - auto-approve under threshold (disabled by default)
cron_jobs.process_approved_to_payable: Daily at 4:00 AM - moves approved to payable
cron_jobs.daily_summary: Daily at 6:00 AM - generates summary report
